hero.subtitle: The ultimate SaaS OS for modern businesses. Streamline calendar bookings, automate workflows, configure live Mercado Pago sandboxes, trace ledger audits, and consult Aura AI in real time.

features.title: Unrivaled Platform Capability
features.subtitle: We've removed all complexity to deliver high-performance modules that put you in control.

appointments.title: Smart Calendar & CRM
appointments.desc: An ultra-fast dynamic agenda with customized statuses, patient/client profiles, and direct customer onboarding database fields.

automation.title: Workflow Engine & APIs
automation.desc: Connect triggers (like successful checkouts) to instant WhatsApp alerts, PostgreSQL entries, and Google Sheets logs automatically.

mercadopago.title: Mercado Pago Simulator
mercadopago.desc: Test real downpayments, dynamic QR codes, rapid wire alias/CBU setup, and WhatsApp automated billing links with zero risk.

metrics.title: Financial closing & LEDGER
metrics.desc: Real-time liquidity graphics, monthly target progress trackers, secured cash closing registries, and relational ERP exports.

multiDevice.title: Aura AI Copilot Engine
multiDevice.desc: Ask business intelligence questions in natural language, retrieve reports immediately, and generate dynamic dashboard gadgets.

aiSupport.title: Multi-tenant RBAC
aiSupport.desc: Securely onboard employee staff, assign roles (Owner, Manager, Staff), and fine-tune dynamic system access controls.

pricing.title: Transparent, Scale-Ready Plans
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Choose the model that matches your current business scope.

howItWorks.title: How does Dashboard OS work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Explore the power of your new management tool.

step1.title: 360° Main Panel
step1.desc: An unified command center displaying live operational speed, active client tallies, and prompt automation logs.

step2.title: Multi-role Smart Agenda
step2.desc: Color-coded booking slots with direct integration to client status trackers and custom drag-and-drop fields.

step3.title: Connected Workflows
step3.desc: Decouple manual routines. Set up rules like 'On New Appointment -> Alert Staff via WhatsApp and sync Sheets'.

step4.title: Interactive Sandbox Checkout
step4.desc: Simulate and test customer online checkout journeys with credit cards, rapipago, bank entities, and digital wallet credits.

step5.title: Financial Audit Logs
step5.desc: Fully compliant cash drawer closes, audit trails tracking user actor details, and CSV/Excel ERP database exporting.

aiSimulator.title: Aura AI Copilot - Live Sandbox Simulator
aiSimulator.subtitle: Experience the intelligence of Aura AI. Select one of the preset business prompts below to see how she answers and generates dynamic layouts in real time.

features.f1Desc: Aura translates natural language into direct PostgreSQL queries to fetch financial records, productivity reports, and client metrics instantly.
features.f2Desc: Instruct Aura to design logics like 'When Mercado Pago payment succeeds, notify on WhatsApp' and she automatically builds the connection nodes.
features.f3Desc: Aura designs, connects, and positions custom visual gadgets directly into your active dashboard command center.

aiSimulator.typing: Aura AI is querying your database...

financeResponse.message: Here is the real-time financial diagnosis of your workspace for this month:
financeResponse.tip: Tip: You've completed 9 workflows this week, reducing client booking dropout rates by 18.4%.

workflowResponse.message: Automation logic successfully initialized and active:
workflowResponse.trigger: TRIGGER: On Customer Booking Approved (Mercado Pago / Bank)
workflowResponse.action1: ACTION 1: Send personalized WhatsApp template with check-in instructions
workflowResponse.action2: ACTION 2: Write log to relational PostgreSQL Audit Ledger

agendaResponse.staff: Active On-duty Staff: 4 members on site

pillars.title: Explore the 5 Pillars of Dashboard OS
pillars.subtitle: Discover how the platform structures its deep features, providing enterprise-grade power for businesses of all scales.

agendaCrm.title: Sleek Booking & Multi-field CRM
agendaCrm.bullet1: High-contrast dynamic calendar cells with customized color indicators.
agendaCrm.bullet2: Rich customer records storing transaction histories, pending balances, and tags.
agendaCrm.bullet3: Direct public calendar url for frictionless client reservations.

automations.title: Decoupled Automation Canvas
automations.bullet1: Visual triggers capturing bookings, payments, and inventory status updates.
automations.bullet2: Instant WhatsApp business reminders with dynamic custom text values.
automations.bullet3: Zero-code third party links (Google Sheets, email services, webhook feeds).

checkout.title: Full-fidelity Payment Gateway Simulator
checkout.bullet1: Official lookalike Checkout Pro simulator supporting digital money credits.
checkout.bullet2: 3D Credit Card preview with automatic provider logo and security flip.
checkout.bullet3: Automated billing messages triggered with bank Alias, CBU, and personal links.

audit.title: Relational Financial Reports & Audit Ledgers
audit.bullet1: Safe cash close records tracking starting cash drawer flow, net earnings, and deviations.
audit.bullet2: PostgreSQL database audit trail showing actor email, timestamps, and metadata.
audit.bullet3: Fast data exports compatible with ERP systems and spreadsheet managers.

rbac.title: Granular User Roles & Permissions Matrix
rbac.bullet1: Simple member invitation portal supporting owner, manager, and receptionist roles.
rbac.bullet2: Fool-proof access protection bypass rules protecting primary workspace operations.
rbac.bullet3: Complete tenant isolation for clean multi-location business management.
